intent_precise: APIv2 PCR Prep 2/4: GAP: Using Labcon Plate on PCR Cooler (pcr_plate, slot 1), PCR Strip on PCR Cooler (labware, slot 2). (1) Pause: Replace 20ul tipracks before resuming. (2) Transfer 10µL from PCR Strip on PCR Cooler A1 to destination A1. (3) Pause for manual intervention.
intent: For this PCR prep step, you'll need to set up a Labcon plate in slot 1 and a PCR strip in slot 2, both on the PCR cooler. First, pause to replace the 20µL tip racks with fresh ones, then transfer 10µL from well A1 of the PCR strip to well A1 of the destination plate. After the transfer is complete, pause again for any manual intervention that might be needed.

commands.message: Part 2/4 (GAP) complete. Please remove plate             from Slot 1 and run on PCR program. When ready, load materials             and run Part 3/4 (EXO) on the OT-2.
